name: mofa-news
description: News digest aggregator — headlines from Google News, Hacker News, Yahoo, Substack, Medium with LLM synthesis

tools.name: news_digest
tools.description: Fetch and synthesize a news digest. Discovers headlines from RSS/API sources, deep-fetches top articles, and produces a structured briefing.

max_articles_per_category.description: Maximum articles to deep-fetch per category. Default: 3

output_path.description: Path to save the digest markdown file. If omitted, returns digest as tool output.
